metadata.name: Notes Demo: Metrics Reporter
metadata.description: Demo workflow: reads project metrics from Notes (saved by Metrics Collector) and generates analysis report. Part 2 of the Metrics Pipeline example. Demonstrates read-note node and {{note:KEY}} template syntax.

nodes.directive: Ask the user which project they want to generate a metrics report for. The project name must match one previously used in the Metrics Collector workflow.
nodes.completionCondition: Project name is provided by the user.

nodes.directive:
Generate a project metrics report using the collected data.

**Latest metrics snapshot:**
{{note:latest-metrics-{{ask-project.projectName}}}}

**All collected metrics notes:**
{{load-all-metrics.metricsNotes}}

Create a structured report that includes:
1. **Project Overview** — name, primary language, project size
2. **Code Health** — lines of code, file count, quality indicators
3. **Testing Summary** — total tests, pass rate, categories covered
4. **Trends** — if multiple collection dates exist, note any changes
5. **Recommendations** — based on the metrics, suggest areas for improvement

Format the report in clean markdown.
nodes.completionCondition: A complete metrics report has been generated with all available data points analyzed.

nodes.directive:
No metrics data was found in Notes. This means the Metrics Collector workflow has not been run yet for any project.

Inform the user that they need to run the 'Notes Demo: Metrics Collector' workflow first to gather project metrics before generating a report.
nodes.completionCondition: User has been informed about the missing data and directed to run the Collector workflow first.
